name: Short Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Mix the first five ingredients in a food processor until combined.
3. Beat together eggs and milk.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the flour mixture and process just enough to blend.
5. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to about 1/2 inch thickness.
6. Cut out 12 circles using a large round cookie cutter.
7. Place six cut-outs on a baking sheet.
8. Top each with a pat of butter and then with a second cut-out.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Split into two layers to create a shortcake.
